summary: Verification round after backend refactor (server.py → deps.py + 7 routers) and new Pydantic bounds + frontend swipe/notification/share polish. All 20 backend pytest cases pass (12 existing + 8 new validation-bound tests) including real GPT-5.2 chat and AI schedule. Frontend smoke on Expo web preview confirms guest login → dashboard, all 5 bottom tabs switchable, FAB add-task → task appears → tap trash icon deletes, AI Plan modal opens correctly. No regressions from refactor.

react_native_issues.issue: Repeated console warning '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web. Adding a listener will have no effect.' — informational; mobile-only feature, expected on web.

Versions still mismatched per expo doctor: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage 3.0.2 vs 2.2.0, expo-linear-gradient 55.0.13 vs ~15.0.8, expo-notifications 55.0.22 vs ~0.32.17, react-native-svg 15.15.4 vs 15.12.1. Cosmetic for now.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update Expo dependencies to expected versions to silence doctor warnings.
OPTIONAL: Gate expo-notifications listener registration behind Platform.OS !== 'web' to silence the repeated web warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: server.py is now ~58 lines, each router is single-purpose. require_user dependency consolidates auth-header/cookie plumbing as recommended in iter_1.
Pydantic bounds correctly applied: PomodoroCreate.duration_minutes uses conint(ge=1, le=240); PrepUpdate.sat_progress / ielts_progress use Optional[conint(ge=0, le=100)] — verified by 422 tests.
Swipeable in planner.tsx wraps each task with both a swipe-action and an inline trash icon — good fallback for web preview where gesture-handler swipes don't fire from Playwright clicks.
PrepUpdate.update_one upsert pattern correctly excludes None fields via dict comprehension and uses $setOnInsert for user_id — no overwrite of unrelated fields.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on smoke flows tested (guest login → 5 tabs → add task → delete via trash → open AI Plan modal)

seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Pytest uses ephemeral guest sessions via POST /api/auth/guest; UI test created TEST_UI_Task_Smoke and deleted it inline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Run pytest from /app: `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://studyflow-ai-45.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Test files: test_studyflow_api.py (existing endpoints) + test_validation_bounds.py (Pydantic bounds). Trash-icon delete uses testID=`delete-{task.id}`; swipe-to-delete uses testID=`swipe-delete-{task.id}` and requires real touch/gesture (not testable in headless browser, use trash icon path). Theme switcher rows in Profile screen are tappable Text rows labeled 'Light' / 'Dark' / 'System'.
